Imports

dada, derep

Types

MergedSequence = object
  sequence*: string
  abundance*: int64
MergePairsOptions = object
  minOverlap*: int
  maxMismatch*: int
  trimOverhang*: bool
  threads*: int
  parallelMinPairs*: int
MergePairsResult = object
  stats*: MergePairsStats
  merged*: seq[MergedSequence]
MergePairsStats = object
  forwardReadCount*: int64
  reverseReadCount*: int64
  synchronizedPairs*: int64
  unsynchronizedReads*: int64
  candidatePairs*: int64
  mergedPairs*: int64
  rejectedPairs*: int64
  uniqueAsvPairs*: int
  uniqueMergedSequences*: int
  rejectedByReason*: array[MergeRejectReason, int64]
MergeRejectReason = enum
  mrrNoForwardAsv, mrrNoReverseAsv, mrrUnsynchronizedReads, mrrNoAlignment,
  mrrTooManyMismatches, mrrOverhangDisallowed

Procs

proc defaultMergePairsOptions(): MergePairsOptions {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc describe(opts: MergePairsOptions): string {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc mergePairs(derepForward: DerepFastqResult; derepReverse: DerepFastqResult;
                dadaForward: DadaResult; dadaReverse: DadaResult;
                opts: MergePairsOptions = defaultMergePairsOptions()): MergePairsResult {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, KeyError, KeyError, ValueError], tags: [TimeEffect],
    forbids: [].}
proc reverseComplement(sequence: string): string {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc validateOptions(opts: MergePairsOptions) {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc writeMergedTsv(path: string; res: MergePairsResult) {....raises: [IOError],
    tags: [WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
